title: In Sleepy Town on Strait of Hormuz, War Rages Just Over Horizon
summary_full: For centuries, an Omani exclave has been defined by a peculiar duality: rugged isolation and proximity to one of the world’s most important trade routes.
summary_public: For centuries, an Omani exclave has been defined by a peculiar duality: rugged isolation and proximity to one of the world’s most important trade routes.
